message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "Administrator" as Admin
participant ":Main UI" as MainUI
participant ":ImportReadingsFromFileUI" as ImportUI
participant ":ImportReadingsFromFileController" as ImportController
participant ":ListOfGeographicArea" as ListOfArea
participant "reader:XmlReader" as XmlReader

Admin -> MainUI : Request file path
MainUI --> Admin : file path
ImportUI -> ImportController : addReadingsToSensors(reader,path)
ImportController -> XmlReader : importReadingsOfSensor(path)
XmlReader --> ImportController : listOfReadingsDto
ImportController -> ListOfArea : getAllSensors()
ListOfArea --> ImportController : listOfAreaSensors
ImportController -> ImportController : setReadingsBySensorIDescription()
ImportController --> ImportUI : number of lines added
ImportUI --> Admin : number of lines added

@enduml
